name: Broccoli-Pasta Toss
recipeInstructions:
PER SERVING: 168 cal., 6g Pro., 24g carbo., 5g fat, 3mg chol., 72mg sodium
In a large saucepan cook broccoli and pasta in a large amount of boiling water for 6-8 minutes or just until tender, stirring occasionally. Drain well. Add oil to the pasta mixture and toss. Stir in cheese, sesame seeds, garlic powder, and pepper to taste. Toss gently to coat evenly. Serve immediately.
